textByHashes.94b49989b029e90ef06ee2bc3ee5cca23898b2cf: A little bit of spice makes everything taste nice! Come and get it here!
textByHashes.7a11bb5ea840fb2dd6b4f04868f493cb57a1ee65: Ah, I'm betting Emelio sent you, right?
textByHashes.33cd36e207476b029d1c3cbb14864757c977907e: Well the good news is that his spices arrived this morning. The bad news is that I can't get the box open.
textByHashes.f0f3843c1d7adf869c8bee898b603c02cab8ac7c: Well this is the first time I've ever had to order in spices from the east, so I needed to find a reputable supplier. I ended up going with a guy called Ali Morrisane who seemed like he knew his stuff.
textByHashes.b7678a53c8e374d4f73a13d72549798a1f91e204: Thing is, he's gone and locked the box to make sure the goods can't be stolen, but hasn't told me how to unlock it again!
textByHashes.9a378b47a71c3f79219073b36b2dce41fbaebb30: Kuani! You did it! I'll have these sent over to Emelio right away. Thanks for the help.
textByHashes.6e8e66a57ef3a025c2bd4f7c31352cd0172c62d8: It's on route to Emelio as we speak. I'm sure it will be with him soon.
textByHashes.ea3095e0fd1b2d94a8c6aec869785fdfef7b3845: You're the one who stole from me! Guards! Guards!
